gt_sql: SELECT T2.driverId FROM pitStops AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.nationality = 'Spanish' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.dob) < '1982' ORDER BY T1.time DESC LIMIT 10
pred_sql:
SELECT d.driverId
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'Spanish'
  AND strftime('%Y', d.dob) < '1982'
GROUP BY d.driverId
ORDER BY MAX(CAST(lt.time AS INTEGER)) DESC
LIMIT 10
question: List out top 10 Spanish drivers who were born before 1982 and have the latest lap time.
